questionHtml:
A mass oscillating in simple harmonic motion on the end of a spring has an amplitude x0 and a total energy ET. The mass on the spring is doubled and made to oscillate with the same amplitude x0.

What is the total energy of the oscillating system after the change?


A.  ET

B.  2ET

C.  2ET

D.  4ET
